title: Seyed Majid Khademi, Iranian Intelligence Chief, Killed in Overnight Attack
summary_full: Israel claimed responsibility for the death of Major General Seyed Majid Khademi, the spy chief of the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps, the latest senior official to be killed in the war.
summary_public: Israel claimed responsibility for the death of Major General Seyed Majid Khademi, the spy chief of the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps, the latest senior official to be killed in the war.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel claimed responsibility for the death of Major General Seyed Majid Khademi

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Seyed Majid Khademi, Iranian Intelligence Chief, Killed
